data.content:
# Requirements

Adding Items

Removing Items

Upgrading / Downgrading items

Submit Cart

Clear Cart

Inventory of Products can change anytime

Prices can change anytime

If the Price of an item changes, it must be removed from the cart ( but stored for later )

Customer will receive a voucher to buy the item for the old price.

## Missing items

- [x] find responsible persons for requirements
- [ ] clarify does the user need to be logged in?

[Jira Ticket](https://www.google.com)

scenarios.title: User can add item to the cart
user can add only 3 items
scenarios.errorDescription: can only add  3 items at a time
